message:
test(wa-core): add reproduction test for dedup suppression bug

Add repro_dedup_bug.rs to demonstrate the "forever suppression" issue
in DetectionContext's deduplication logic. The test shows that once a
pattern is detected and deduplicated, it remains suppressed indefinitely
(until 1000 other keys push it out of the LRU cache) rather than
expiring after the configured TTL.

This test scaffolds investigation into time-based expiry for the
dedup cache in PatternEngine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
